appName.description: Extension name shown in Chrome Web Store and chrome://extensions

appDescription.message: Scan and generate QR codes from any page. Long-press images to decode, right-click to generate.
appDescription.description: Short description for Chrome Web Store

contextMenu_generateSelection.description: Context menu: generate QR from selected text. %s is replaced by Chrome with selected text.

contextMenu_generatePage.description: Context menu: generate QR from current page URL

contextMenu_generateLink.description: Context menu: generate QR from a link's URL

contextMenu_scanImage.message: Scan QR code from this image
contextMenu_scanImage.description: Context menu: scan/decode a QR code from an image

toast_scanning.description: Shown while scanning an image for QR codes

toast_scanSuccess.description: Shown when QR code scan succeeds. $content$ is the decoded text.

toast_scanFailed.message: No QR code found in this image
toast_scanFailed.description: Shown when scanning fails to detect a QR code

toast_scanError.description: Shown when scanning encounters an error. $reason$ is the error detail.

toast_copySuccess.description: Shown when content is copied to clipboard. $content$ is what was copied.

toast_isURL.description: Shown when detected QR content is a URL and is being opened

toast_generateSuccess.description: Shown when QR code generation succeeds

toast_generateFailed.description: Shown when QR generation fails. $reason$ is the error detail.

options_autoOpenUrl.message: Auto-open when QR content is a URL
options_autoOpenUrl.description: Checkbox label: automatically open URLs found in QR codes

options_openInNewTab.message: Open URL in a new tab
options_openInNewTab.description: Radio/checkbox option: open detected URL in a new tab

options_openInCurrentTab.description: Radio/checkbox option: open detected URL in the current tab

popup_enableLongPress.message: Enable long-press to scan QR codes
popup_enableLongPress.description: Checkbox: enable long-press on images to scan QR codes
